# Phase 10.0.11 Governance Learning Plan

Status: Planning-only. This plan does not create executable workflows, runtime authority, provider authority, infrastructure authority, deployment authority, autonomous governance, APIs, background jobs, autonomous educational authority systems, automated governance indoctrination systems, or execution authority.

## Objective

Preserve constitutional knowledge transfer, governance education continuity, apprenticeship, mentorship, literacy, and institutional understanding after uncertainty survivability doctrine.

## In-Scope Documents

- Constitutional knowledge-transfer doctrine.
- Governance education survivability philosophy.
- Institutional apprenticeship continuity framework.
- Civilization governance literacy standards.
- Constitutional teaching continuity architecture.
- Institutional learning survivability doctrine.
- Governance mentorship preservation philosophy.
- Civilization knowledge inheritance architecture.
- Constitutional literacy continuity standards.
- Governance understanding survivability doctrine.
- Phase 10.0.11 knowledge transfer summary.

## Validation Checklist

- No runtime activation exists.
- No execution authorization exists.
- No deployment authorization exists.
- No provider onboarding exists.
- No orchestration activation exists.
- No infrastructure activation exists.
- No education-continuity layer creates runtime authority.
- No apprenticeship process bypasses constitutional supremacy.
- No teaching layer enables hidden execution escalation.
- No governance-learning framework weakens auditability.

## Review Notes

- Governance learning remains human-reviewed, auditable, non-runtime, non-operational, and anti-indoctrination.
- Apprenticeship transfers responsibility and understanding, not execution authority.
- Literacy standards preserve constitutional reasoning, not rote compliance.
- Do not include: runtime enablement, providers, adapters, deployment paths, credentials, OAuth, APIs, fetch/axios, Prisma/Supabase changes, background jobs, autonomous governance, autonomous educational authority systems, automated governance indoctrination systems, or execution systems.
